# hindclaw_bank (Resource)

Manages a Hindsight memory bank identity and profile.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hindclaw_bank" "agent_alpha" {
  bank_id = "agent-alpha"
  name    = "Agent Alpha"
  mission = "Strategic mentor and advisor"

  disposition_skepticism = 3
  disposition_literalism = 2
  disposition_empathy    = 4
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bank_id` (String) Bank identifier. Immutable after creation.

### Optional

- `background` (String) Background context for the agent.
- `disposition_empathy` (Number) Empathy (1=detached, 5=empathetic).
- `disposition_literalism` (Number) Literalism (1=flexible, 5=literal).
- `disposition_skepticism` (Number) Skepticism (1=trusting, 5=skeptical).
- `enable_observations` (Boolean) Enable observations. Write-only (not returned by GetBankProfile).
- `mission` (String) The agent's mission.
- `name` (String) Bank display name.
- `observations_mission` (String) Custom observations mission. Write-only (not returned by GetBankProfile).
- `reflect_mission` (String) Custom reflect mission. Write-only (not returned by GetBankProfile).
- `retain_mission` (String) Custom retain mission. Write-only (not returned by GetBankProfile).
